requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment — OCC Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备 — OCC型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備 — OCC型號認證

summary.en: Samoa requires mandatory type approval from the Office of the Communications Commissioner (OCC) for radio transmitting equipment and telecom terminal equipment intended for connection to public networks or operation in Samoa, under the Communications Act 2016. Applicants must submit a technical file and supporting test reports; AS/NZS accredited laboratory test reports are accepted as a technical basis for OCC approval. CE, FCC, and CCC marks and approvals are not recognised and do not satisfy OCC requirements. The OCC type approval is ordinarily held by the local Samoan authorised importer or agent.
summary.zh: 依据《2016年通信法》，萨摩亚要求对拟在萨摩亚境内连接公共网络或运行的无线电发射设备及电信终端设备，须取得通信专员办公室（OCC）的强制型号认证。申请人须提交技术文件及支持性测试报告；OCC接受AS/NZS认可实验室出具的测试报告作为技术依据。CE、FCC及CCC标志及认证不被认可，不能满足OCC要求。OCC型号认证通常由萨摩亚本地授权进口商或代理持有。
summary.zht: 依據《2016年通訊法》，薩摩亞要求對擬在薩摩亞境內連接公共網絡或運行的無線電發射設備及電信終端設備，須取得通訊專員辦公室（OCC）的強制型號認證。申請人須提交技術文件及支持性測試報告；OCC接受AS/NZS認可實驗室出具的測試報告作為技術依據。CE、FCC及CCC標誌及認證不被認可，不能滿足OCC要求。OCC型號認證通常由薩摩亞本地授權進口商或代理持有。

standards_or_laws: Communications Act 2016 (Samoa) — enabling legislation for OCC licensing and type approval of radio and telecom terminal equipment
OCC Type Approval Framework — mandatory for radio and telecom terminal equipment operated or connected to public networks in Samoa
AS/NZS accredited lab reports — accepted by OCC as technical evidence in support of type approval applications

summary.en: In China, radio transmitting equipment requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval issued by MIIT. Telecom terminal equipment requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Technical conformance is demonstrated against GB radio and telecom product standards. These approvals are mandatory domestic Chinese requirements and are not transferable to or recognised by OCC Samoa.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电发射设备须取得MIIT颁发的SRRC（中国国家无线电管理机构）型号认证。电信终端设备须取得MIIT网络准入许可（NAL）。技术合规须依据GB无线电及电信产品标准进行验证。上述认证均为中国境内强制要求，不可转移至萨摩亚或被OCC认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電發射設備須取得MIIT頒發的SRRC（中國國家無線電管理機構）型號認證。電信終端設備須取得MIIT網絡准入許可（NAL）。技術合規須依據GB無線電及電信產品標準進行驗證。上述認證均為中國境內強制要求，不可轉移至薩摩亞或被OCC認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC — State Radio Regulation of China type approval for radio transmitters (MIIT)
MIIT NAL — Network Access License for telecom terminal equipment
GB 15629.11 — Chinese standard for 2.4 GHz WLAN equipment (Wi-Fi)
GB 15629.21 — Chinese standard for Bluetooth equipment

gap.en: SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL are not recognised by OCC Samoa. A separate OCC type approval application must be made for each product model intended for Samoa. AS/NZS accredited lab test reports may be submitted in support of the OCC application but do not replace OCC's own evaluation process. CE and FCC test data may be submitted for reference but are not directly accepted. The OCC approval must be obtained before the product is supplied, connected, or operated in Samoa.
gap.zh: SRRC型号认证及MIIT NAL不被萨摩亚OCC认可。每款拟在萨摩亚销售的产品型号须单独申请OCC型号认证。AS/NZS认可实验室测试报告可作为OCC申请的支持材料提交，但不能替代OCC自身的评估程序。CE及FCC测试数据也可作为参考材料提交，但不被直接接受。产品在萨摩亚供应、接入或运行前，必须先取得OCC认证。
gap.zht: SRRC型號認證及MIIT NAL不被薩摩亞OCC認可。每款擬在薩摩亞銷售的產品型號須單獨申請OCC型號認證。AS/NZS認可實驗室測試報告可作為OCC申請的支持材料提交，但不能替代OCC自身的評估程序。CE及FCC測試數據也可作為參考材料提交，但不被直接接受。產品在薩摩亞供應、接入或運行前，必須先取得OCC認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — OCC type approval required before supply, connection to public networks, or operation of radio and telecom terminal equipment in Samoa under the Communications Act 2016
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL required for radio transmitters and telecom terminal equipment in China

source.publisher: Office of the Communications Commissioner, Samoa (OCC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC and MIIT NAL approvals are not recognised by OCC Samoa. A separate Samoa OCC type approval application is required for each radio or telecom terminal equipment model. AS/NZS accredited lab test reports may support the application but do not replace OCC evaluation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC及MIIT NAL认证不被萨摩亚OCC认可。每款无线电或电信终端设备型号须单独申请萨摩亚OCC型号认证。AS/NZS认可实验室测试报告可作为申请支持材料，但不能替代OCC评估程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC及MIIT NAL認證不被薩摩亞OCC認可。每款無線電或電信終端設備型號須單獨申請薩摩亞OCC型號認證。AS/NZS認可實驗室測試報告可作為申請支持材料，但不能替代OCC評估程序。
